# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:BRZ_campos_sales = { #Manoel Ferraz de Campos Salles
	first_name = Manoel_Ferraz
	last_name = de_Campos_Salles
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:brazilian
	female = no
	ig_leader = yes
	religion = rel:catholic
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_market_liberal
	birth_date = 1836.12.4
	traits = {
		persistent
		expert_political_operator
	}
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            exists = c:BRZ
            c:BRZ ?= THIS
			has_dlc_feature = rp1_content
			NOR = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1870.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1914.1.1
        chance = 50
    }
}
